title: Xie Qing
content:
Xie Qing
 is 
Wang Lin
's second disciple.

Spoiler

He is the third soul of 
Su Dao
.

Contents

1

History

1.1

Book Seven

1.2

Book Ten

1.3

Book Eleven

History
[
]

Book Seven
[
]

In the past, he was a mortal scholar that helped Wang Lin by accident in his search for enlightenment. Afterwards, he was accepted by Wang Lin as an honorary disciple but he only cultivated his soul. He has completely given up spells and only cultivates domain. This is a cultivation method that didn’t exist in this world. It is similar to how the ancient gods only cultivated their bodies, but Xie Qing only cultivated his domain.

Book Ten
[
]

He doesn't have the ability to fight or any cultivation level but he is enlightened in the way of the heavens such that even 
Nirvana Scryer
 cultivators are inferior to him. His domain had reached the level of 
Nirvana Cleanser
 and he even caught a glimpse of laws.

Book Eleven
[
]

While the war between the 
Inner
 and 
Outer Realm
 raged, he regained his memories from his previous reincarnation and understood his identity. So he escaped from 
Planet Qing Lin
 to another planet in 
Allheaven
. He hid himself and pondered over his situation for over a century.

Spoiler

Finally, he decided to commit suicide and give his soul to Wang Lin instead of letting it fall in the hands of 
Seven-Colored Daoist
 or 
Old Ghost Zhan
. His death allowed Wang Lin to take in the third soul and open the core of the Cave World.

↑

Chapter 1749
